meta.title: US and Israel launch STRIKES against IRAN: What you need to know
meta.description:
Last night, the United States and Israel launched large-scale combat operations against the ruling regime of Iran, with air and missile strikes targeting senior Iranian officials and military assets across the nation, starting at roughly 1:00 AM Eastern time, or about 9 a.m. in Tehran. Now, multiple sources are reporting that Iran’s Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, seems to have been among those killed in these strikes.
